_meta.title: MarioTrickster 蒸馏知识库
_meta.description: 从 PROMPT_RECIPES.md 核心规则 + PDF 书籍蒸馏的结构化知识。驱动首次出图参数优化、Prompt 增强和智能质检。
_meta.style_epoch: S81+ (吉卜力BG × BD描边 × 游戏俯瞰，像素风已废弃)
_meta.usage: 由 knowledge_loader.py 自动加载，run_pipeline.py 在构建工作流时调用。
_meta.how_to_add_knowledge: 上传 PDF 后，将蒸馏结论按分区格式追加到对应数组中，管线下次运行自动生效。

style_foundation._doc: S81确立的基准画风，替代旧版 pixel_art_rules（已废弃）
style_foundation.positive_prompt_base: masterpiece, best quality, anime background art, (thick black outlines:1.3), (hand-drawn ink outlines:1.2), (cel shading:1.2), (flat color fill:1.1), (limited color palette:1.1), (simplified shadow 2-tone:1.2), (cool blue shadow:1.1), warm natural color scheme, earthy tones, no gradient shading, no realistic rendering, game asset background, 2D side-scroller environment
style_foundation.negative_prompt_base: (worst quality:1.4), (low quality:1.4), blurry, gradient shading, realistic, photorealistic, 3D render, smooth airbrush, no outlines, soft edges, anti-aliasing, text, watermark, oversaturated, HDR, lens flare, bloom, multiple light sources, complex shadows

style_drift_rules.anchor_check_interval: 每连续生成 3-5 个资产必须回看概念锚点
style_drift_rules.rule: denoising > 0.50 视为高风险漂移区

outline_rules: 轮廓线应有粗细变化（线的抑扬）
CSI线质理论：C(curve)/S(s_curve)=柔软有机, I(straight)=硬度张力
MarioTrickster = 卡通风 → C/S 主体 + I(陷阱/人工物)

color_rules.highlight: warm yellow tint in sunlit areas

composition_rules._doc: 构图规则 (蒸馏自抽屉2: 透视与构图)

canvas_margin.rule: 角色四周必须留出足够空白，防止裁切

composition_types_6._source: 構図6タイプ選択法則（吉田誠治）

eye_guidance_layout._source: 目線誘導レイアウト法則（室井）

tangent_avoidance._source: タンジェント回避法則（吉田誠治）
tangent_avoidance.rule: never let edges just touch; either separate or overlap

depth_spacing_compression.rule: receding objects closer together, equal spacing kills depth

vp_safety._source: 消失点配置安全法則（吉田誠治）

camera_angle_table._source: 画角印象選択テーブル（吉田誠治）+ 広角/望遠レンズ効果法則（室井）
camera_angle_table.wide_angle: strong perspective, center focus, immersive (1st person)
camera_angle_table.standard_slightly_tele: default for anime, no special intent

scene_dispatch.gameplay_sprite: pure side view maintained, negative isometric
scene_dispatch.concept_art: multi-angle allowed, Side View First → 3/4 View workflow

human_scale_reference._source: 人体スケール基準法則（室井）

animation_core_rules._doc: 动画核心规则 (蒸馏自抽屉3: 动画与物理) — 所有标记为【核心規則】的条目

anti_slide.rule: 角色/敌人重心锁死在 Bottom Center (0.5, 0)，地形/陷阱重心为 Center (0.5, 0.5)

universal_physics.controlnet_mandatory: 所有带连续动作的生物关节角色强制启用 DWPose/OpenPose 预处理器

gravity_axis_tilt._source: 重心軸傾斜ダイナミズム法則（室井）【核心】
gravity_axis_tilt.prompt_tags: dynamic pose, tilted center of gravity, off-balance stance

weight_expression_1_5x._source: 重量表現1.5倍法則（室井）【核心】

contrapposto._source: 対立力量法則（Contrapposto）【核心規則】
contrapposto.detail: 力量从脚底向上传递，每个关节是方向改变节点；Major Forces=躯干核心(结构性), Minor Forces=四肢(装饰性)

arc_of_motion._source: 運動曲線法則（Arc of Motion）【核心規則】
arc_of_motion.rule: all body parts follow arcs, no linear interpolation
arc_of_motion.detail: 头/手/脚的帧间轨迹必须是平滑弧线；偏离弧线=视觉卡顿

loa_impression_driven._source: LoA（Line of Action）印象駆動法則（砂糖）【核心規則】
loa_impression_driven.rule: LoA=全身贯穿的1条印象线→最先决定
loa_impression_driven.scene_dispatch: gesture/animation_keypose=本法则, character_sheet/turnaround=解剖精度优先

csi_line_theory._source: CSI線質理論（砂糖）【核心規則】
csi_line_theory.mario_trickster_ratio: cartoon → C/S主体 + I(陷阱/人工物)

follow_through._source: Follow-Through（跟随延迟）法则 + 波伝播法則（Telecom2）
follow_through.wave_propagation: force travels root to tip, each segment delays 1-2 frames
follow_through.flag_amplitude: fixed edge tight ripples → free edge large waves
follow_through.prompt_tags: hair follow-through, cloth wave propagation, flowing cape

anticipation._source: Anticipation（预备动作）法则 + ジャンプ予備動作蹲み必須法則（Telecom2）【核心】
anticipation.rule: all fast actions must have anticipation frames
anticipation.attack_rhythm: Anticipation(蓄力2-3帧,慢) → Strike(打击1-2帧,极快) → Recovery(收势1帧,慢)
anticipation.jump_mandatory: forward_lean + crouch before takeoff, landing knee_bend cushion mandatory

loop_closure.rule: loop last frame seamless to first, loop equal spacing mandatory

action_knowledge._doc: 每个动作的深度蒸馏知识 (融合 PROMPT_RECIPES.md 核心规则)

common_defects: 完全静止无呼吸感
手臂贴身僵硬
循环跳帧
idle.prompt_boost: subtle chest rise and fall, gentle weight shift, relaxed fingers slightly apart, natural S-curve pose, contrapposto weight on one leg

common_defects: 滑步无脚跟过渡 (AI最常见错误: 后脚直线前滑而非踵キックバック弧)
手臂不协调 (右脚前→左手前, 同侧同向=错误)
无上下动 (中间帧体最高, 交叉帧体最低)
重心不在支撑脚上方
循环不闭合
walk.prompt_boost: heel-to-toe foot roll, opposite arm swing synchronized with legs, vertical bounce at passing position, trailing heel kicks up backward first then swings forward in arc, forward lean, torso counter-rotation, hair follow-through, kicking foot behind
core_rules_applied: walk_4_elements (上下动/脚运/手臂反向/重心平衡)
walk_heel_kickback_arc【核心】(后脚踵先上后方踢→弧线前摆, 非直线滑)
walk_7element_checklist【核心】(视线/发/肩/躯干扭/服/蹴脚/重心前倾)

common_defects: 腿部不弯曲像滑步
手臂不摆动
无前倾 (跑步前倾角度比走路更大)
无空中帧 (走路=至少1帧双脚着地, 跑步=至少1帧双脚离地)
循环不自然
颈部未埋入肩膀
run.prompt_boost: dynamic leg extension with knee bend over 90 degrees, vigorous arm swing, forward lean greater than walk, aerial phase both feet off ground, bow-shaped body, neck hidden in shoulders, hair and clothes flowing back with strong follow-through, torso twist greater than walk
core_rules_applied: run_vs_walk_aerial_phase【核心】(跑=空中帧双脚离地, 走=常有一脚接地)
bow_shape_direction_expression (弓形身体表达前进方向)
follow_through (发/服的跟随延迟比走路更大)

common_defects: 无预备蹲直接起跳 (看起来像漂浮, 非跳跃)
空中姿态僵硬 (应为全身伸展stretched)
落地无缓冲 (必须膝盖弯曲吸震)
无手臂辅助上升动作
jump.prompt_boost: clear anticipation squat before takeoff with forward lean, stretched body at apex with arms assisting upward, compressed landing with deep knee bend cushion, squash at crouch stretch at apex, arc trajectory not linear
core_rules_applied: jump_anticipation_crouch_mandatory【核心】(前倾+蹲→起跳, 无预备=漂浮感)
anticipation (蓄力帧密→起跳帧疏→落地帧密)

common_defects: 无蓄力直接挥 (缺少 anticipation)
挥剑轨迹是直线 (应为弧线)
无击中停顿 (impact freeze frame 缺失)
重心不转移 (应从后脚到前脚)
剑尖未描绘宽弧
attack_sword.prompt_boost: wind-up pull back with body twist before slash, wide arc trajectory sword swing, impact freeze frame at contact, weight shift from back foot to front foot, sword tip traces wide arc, 80 percent arm extension at max impact
core_rules_applied: anticipation (蓄力2-3帧慢→打击1-2帧极快→收势1帧慢)
sword_slash_anticipation_arc (体ねじり+剑上→高速弧→フォロースルー)

common_defects: 瞬间消失 (应有完整倒下过程)
倒下方向不一致
无触地弹跳 (重物着地应有微弹)
无受击僵直帧
death.prompt_boost: hit stagger freeze frame, accelerating fall with slow-in timing, ground contact bounce with squash, final rest pose stable, follow-through on hair and clothes during fall
core_rules_applied: spacing_speed_control (加速下落=帧间距从密到疏)
follow_through (倒下时发/服的延迟跟随)
bounce_material_differentiation (角色体型决定弹跳模式)

critical_frames: 大幅手臂摆动(exaggerated arm swing)
common_defects: 和普通跑步无区别 (前倾不够)
速度感不足 (需要更大的弓形弯曲)
无speed lines/motion blur暗示
dash.prompt_boost: extreme forward lean 30-45 degrees, exaggerated arm swing much larger than run, rapid stride frequency faster than run, bow-shaped body expressing extreme speed, speed lines, strong follow-through on all soft elements, center of gravity far ahead of toes
core_rules_applied: run_speed_body_lean_correlation (dash=最大前倾/最大步幅/最大摆臂)

vfx_knowledge._doc: VFX 特效知识 (蒸馏自抽屉3+4的特效相关规则)

smoke.rule: 球状山部分向上传递 + 均等间距 + 轮廓一致
smoke.sphere_decomposition: 大规模烟/爆発=重叠球体集合，各球体山部上移动画
smoke.dissipate: 扩散→粒子化→消失 (不是缩小)
smoke.prompt_tags: billowing smoke, spherical cloud forms, smoke expanding dissipating

fire.loop: 6帧标准 + 整体轮廓不变 + 内部随机变化
fire.s_curve_flicker: S字カーブで上昇流, 分裂と再生を繰り返す
fire.prompt_tags: fire white yellow core, orange mid flame, flame S-curve flicker, fire loop 6 frames

explosion.silhouette: flower shape, scattered balance, size variation
explosion.prompt_tags: explosion flower silhouette, scattered debris, flash then fire then smoke

water_splash.sequence: V型飛沫→水柱上升→王冠状拡散→水滴分離→同心円波紋収束
water_splash.prompt_tags: water splash crown sequence, V-shape splash, concentric ripples

effect_priority_table._source: エフェクトのゲーム内実装優先度テーブル【核心】

effect_lifecycle._source: エフェクト発生→消滅フロー法則【核心】
effect_lifecycle.rule: must specify phase: start/peak/end in prompt
effect_lifecycle.prompt_tags: effect start phase, effect peak phase, effect dissipating phase

effect_color_3axis._source: エフェクト色彩3軸法則【核心】
effect_color_3axis.soft_hard: soft=rounded edge smoke/cloud, hard=sharp edge lightning/explosion

lighting_material_rules._doc: 光影与材质核心规则 (蒸馏自抽屉4)

three_light_source_wf._source: 3光源ライティングWF（吉田誠治）【核心】
workflow: Step1: 直接光で2色塗り分け (light face=showcase, shadow face=single fill)
Step2: 反射光追加 (blue tint in shadow, sky reflection)
Step3: 透過光/SSS追加 (skin terminator=warm orange/pink, backlit leaves=vivid green)
three_light_source_wf.prompt_tags: direct light 2-color split, blue tinted reflected light in shadow, subsurface scattering warm terminator

direct_light_2color._source: 直接光2色塗り分け法則（吉田誠治）【核心】
direct_light_2color.rule: decide showcase face first → light direction follows

aerial_perspective_6._source: 6種空気遠近法テクニック（吉田誠治）【核心】
techniques: contrast_gradient (近景高对比/远景低对比)
compare_bright_shadow_crush (只压暗影色→清澈空气感)

metal_3_rules._source: 金属の3ルール法則（バニリゾ）【核心】
rules: 明暗コントラスト強い
ハイライト極端に明るい
明暗境界はっきり (境界=ベースカラーより暗い)
metal_3_rules.prompt_tags: metallic surface, strong contrast, extreme bright highlight, sharp light dark boundary

time_weather_table._source: 時間天候ライティング変化テーブル（吉田誠治）【核心】

lighting_direction_shadow_table._source: 光源別体陰影方向テーブル（バニリゾ）【核心】

surface_material_3types.shiny: high contrast, form shadow as horizon reflection

wrinkle_5_types._source: 服のシワ5分類体系（みにまる）
wrinkle_5_types.thickness_rule: thin fabric=more wrinkles, thick fabric=fewer wrinkles
wrinkle_5_types.prompt_tags: pulled fabric wrinkles, twisted fabric folds, bent elbow fabric folds

wind_force_expression._source: 風力表現法則（室井）【核心】
rules: center of gravity lean into wind
ALL flow direction unified (hair/clothes/ribbons same direction)
wind_force_expression.negative_prompt: inconsistent wind direction, hair blowing different directions

pose_construction_rules._doc: 姿势构建规则 (蒸馏自抽屉2+3的人体构建相关)

gesture_3pass_workflow._source: ジェスチャー3段階ワークフロー法則（砂糖）

5_core_shapes._source: 5 Core Shapes 万物構築法則（Peter Han）【核心】

centerline_contour_workflow._source: Center Line → Contour Line 体積伝達ワークフロー（Peter Han）【核心】
centerline_contour_workflow.order: centerline first → contour wraps like ribs of spine → minimal contours

silhouette_readability._source: シルエットドローイング法則（みにまる）
silhouette_readability.rule: silhouette readability = good pose; check negative silhouette between limbs

one_leg_balance._source: 片足バランス全身統一法則（室井）【核心】
one_leg_balance.rule: straight support leg, arms spread for balance, whole body as single mass over support foot

emotion_pose_table._source: みにまるポーズ感情読解法則 + 感情関節距離法則（OCHABI）
emotion_pose_table.closed_pose: sad, defensive (arms close to body, lean forward)
emotion_pose_table.joy: joints away from axis, active gesture

effect_character_interaction._source: エフェクトとキャラクター相互作用法則（松岡）【核心】
effect_character_interaction.rule: character affects effect shape AND effect affects character pose

generation_presets._doc: 根据蒸馏知识推导的首次生成最优参数

jump._reason: 跳跃需要纵向空间和更多帧来表现五阶段(蹲/弹/顶/落/缓冲)

attack_sword._reason: 攻击需要横向空间展示挥剑弧线

death._reason: 死亡倒下需要横向空间和更多帧

run._reason: 跑步动态大，步数提高到 8 保证帧间一致性

dash._reason: 冲刺=极端版跑步，参数同 run

crop_detected.method: 根据 composition_rules.aspect_ratio_by_action 计算目标尺寸

consistency_low.also_consider: steps >= 12 仍不一致 → 问题可能在驱动视频而非采样

color_shift.method: 强化 style_foundation.positive_prompt_base 中的色彩锚点
color_shift.also_consider: 偏移 > 60 → prompt 描述不准确而非调色板问题

animation_defect.method: 根据检测到的缺陷类型，从 animation_core_rules 中提取对应的 prompt_tags 注入
animation_defect.example: 检测到滑步 → 注入 walk_heel_kickback_arc 的 prompt_tags
